core.label: Wolfram Language Fundamentals
core.description: Symbolic computation, pattern matching, and knowledge-based programming.

topics.label: Wolfram Notebooks
topics.description: Use Mathematica or free Wolfram Cloud notebooks. The language is tightly integrated with its notebook interface.

topics.label: Expressions & Everything is an Expression
topics.description: Head[args] structure. Numbers, strings, lists, graphics — all are expressions.

topics.label: Lists & Functional Operations
topics.description: Map, Select, Table, Nest, Fold, Apply. List manipulation is central.

topics.label: Pattern Matching & Rules
topics.description: _ (blank), __ (sequence), /. for replacement rules. Wolfram's core paradigm.

topics.label: Function Definitions
topics.description: f[x_] := body, pure functions (Function, #, &), and multiple definitions.

topics.label: Symbolic Math
topics.description: Solve, Integrate, D, Series, Limit, DSolve. Symbolic computation is Wolfram's strength.

topics.label: Visualization
topics.description: Plot, ListPlot, Plot3D, Graphics, Manipulate. Interactive visualization built-in.

topics.label: Built-in Knowledge
topics.description: Entity, GeoPosition, ChemicalData, WordData. Access curated data directly.

topics.label: Deployment
topics.description: CloudDeploy, APIFunction, FormFunction. Deploy as APIs or web forms.
